# Flight to the Sea

> [!info] 💧 Event · Cost: **2** · Spirit

---

Play only if you control a **_Noldor**_ or **_Silvan**_ hero.
**Planning Action**: Shuffle a set aside Wind from the Sea into the encounter deck. Then, remove Flight to the Sea from the game.
